title: serratula nudicaulis subsp. transcaucasica
intro: Serratula nudicaulis subsp. transcaucasica, also known as Caucasian milkwort or Caucasus serratula, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Serratula nudicaulis subsp. transcaucasica include reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and treating various gastrointestinal issues. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat digestive problems and skin conditions.
